description: Recto: Partnership agreement, probably late, between four individuals, including Masʿūd and Yehuda. Much of the space is devoted to how they will behave toward one another, e.g., they will never go more than three days without making peace even if one partner behaves badly. Verso: Pen trials. ASE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
